1.content:
Gal Gadot shivered in her sleep and reached for the covers. However, no matter how much she reached she couldn't find the covers. In fact it did feel like she was even in her bed. This caused Gal to wake up. The gorgeous Israeli actress quickly realized she was no longer in her home and still wearing nothing but her white night gown. Then Gal realized the most horrifying part of her predicament. SHE WAS ONLY ABOUT AN INCH TALL!

         By the way where was Gal Gadot?
1.title: Waking Up

info.brief_description: A bite sized Israeli actress and hungry animals. What could go wrong?
info.description:
The lovely actress Gal Gadot(age 35) wakes up to find herself randomly shrunk to an inch somewhere in the world. However, that's the least of her worries though. The area is full of hungry animals and Gal looks good enough to eat! How long can this lovely lady survive before she finds herself being digested?

Gal Gadot as she appears in this story: https://pics.wikifeet.com/Gal-Gadot-Feet-2178811.jpg

Rules:
1.) Gal Gadot can not shrink or grow anymore.
2.) Gal Gadot is not immune to digestion.
3.) Gal Gadot must eventually be consumed.
4.) Soft or cock vore is preferable.
5.) Have fun!
info.pretty_title: Gal Gadot Shrunk With Hungry Animals
